title: Validate T-Deck SD SPI frequency and storage node
description: Verify the disabled Zephyr SPI SDHC node for the LilyGO T-Deck SD card before enabling storage. Confirm SD CS GPIO39 mapping, safe spi-max-frequency, card detect/power assumptions if any, LittleFS/FAT choice, and coexistence with LoRa/display on SPI3. Meshtastic uses high SD_SPI_FREQUENCY values, but Zephyr bring-up should choose validated timing. Acceptance: SD card mount/read/write smoke passes on physical T-Deck without disturbing LoRa transfers; frequency and failure mode are recorded.
notes:
No-hardware validation completed on EC2 using instance i-0a1a09fa54c21be0e in us-east-2a with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Primary cached worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN was dirty with unrelated generated/build artifacts and was preserved; validation used clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-sd-validation.

Implemented optional validation fragments:
- lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.conf enables SDHC, disk access, FAT, shell FS commands, 4096-byte heap, and explicitly keeps CONFIG_FS_FATFS_MOUNT_MKFS=n so shell mount attempts do not auto-format a removable card.
- lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.overlay deletes the SD CS hog, enables tdeck_sd and nested mmc, and caps SD SPI at 4 MHz for bring-up.

Source/pin evidence:
- Local DTS t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.dts already models SD as tdeck_sd: sd@2, compatible zephyr,sdhc-spi-slot, CS index 2, nested zephyr,sdmmc-disk, and SD CS hog on GPIO39; SPI3 pins come from t_deck-pinctrl.dtsi.
- Current Meshtastic T-Deck variant.h maps SDCARD_CS/SPI_CS=39 and SPI_MOSI=41, SPI_SCK=40, SPI_MISO=38, with LoRa CS=9 and TFT CS=12: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/meshtastic/firmware/master/variants/esp32s3/t-deck/variant.h
- Current LilyGO T-Deck UnitTest utilities.h maps BOARD_SDCARD_CS=39, RADIO_CS_PIN=9, BOARD_TFT_CS=12, BOARD_SPI_MOSI=41, BOARD_SPI_MISO=38, BOARD_SPI_SCK=40, BOARD_POWERON=10: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Xinyuan-LilyGO/T-Deck/master/examples/UnitTest/utilities.h

EC2 build/test evidence:
1. Gateway SD validation final PASS:
   west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build-tdeck-gateway-sd-validation-final -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.conf -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.overlay
   Result: PASS. Only notable warning was pre-existing Zephyr library warning: No SOURCES given to Zephyr library: drivers__net; Excluding target from build.
   Memory: FLASH 291644 B / 16776960 B (1.74%); iram0_0_seg 52200 B / 329 KB (15.49%); dram0_0_seg 106608 B / 313 KB (33.26%); irom0_0_seg 160774 B / 16 MB (0.96%); drom0_0_seg 226108 B / 16 MB (1.35%).
   Kconfig inspected: CONFIG_SDHC=y, CONFIG_SPI_SDHC=y, CONFIG_DISK_ACCESS=y, CONFIG_DISK_DRIVER_SDMMC=y, CONFIG_FILE_SYSTEM=y, CONFIG_FAT_FILESYSTEM_ELM=y, CONFIG_FILE_SYSTEM_SHELL=y, CONFIG_FILE_SYSTEM_SHELL_TEST_COMMANDS=y, CONFIG_HEAP_MEM_POOL_SIZE=4096, CONFIG_SHELL=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_LORA=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_RADIO_MODEL_SX126X=y, and CONFIG_FS_FATFS_MKFS / CONFIG_FS_FATFS_MOUNT_MKFS not set.
   Generated DTS inspected: /chosen keeps zephyr,lora=&lora0; SPI3 cs-gpios include GPIO9, GPIO12, GPIO39; lora0 remains at CS0; tdeck_sd: sd@2 is compatible zephyr,sdhc-spi-slot, reg=<0x2>, status okay, spi-max-frequency=<0x3d0900> (4 MHz), nested mmc compatible zephyr,sdmmc-disk status okay; t_deck_sd_cs_hog absent, t_deck_tft_cs_hog remains because display was not enabled in this build.

2. Gateway display+SD validation PASS:
   west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/gateway -d build-tdeck-gateway-display-sd-validation -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE="boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.conf;boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.conf" -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE="boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_display_validation.overlay;boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.overlay"
   Result: PASS. Same known drivers__net warning only.
   Memory: FLASH 292084 B / 16776960 B (1.74%); iram0_0_seg 52200 B / 329 KB (15.49%); dram0_0_seg 106680 B / 313 KB (33.28%); irom0_0_seg 162214 B / 16 MB (0.97%); drom0_0_seg 226548 B / 16 MB (1.35%).
   Kconfig inspected: CONFIG_DISPLAY=y, CONFIG_ST7789V=y, CONFIG_MIPI_DBI_SPI=y plus the same SD/FAT/shell/no-mkfs settings as the SD-only validation build.
   Generated DTS inspected: /chosen keeps zephyr,lora=&lora0 and zephyr,display=&tdeck_display; SPI3 cs-gpios include GPIO9/GPIO12/GPIO39; tdeck_sd okay at 4 MHz with nested zephyr,sdmmc-disk okay.

3. Zephyr fs_sample with T-Deck SD fragments PASS:
   west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/zephyr/samples/subsys/fs/fs_sample -d build-tdeck-fs-sample-sd-validation -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=$PWD/lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.conf -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=$PWD/lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.overlay
   Result: PASS. Earlier incorrect relative sample path zephyr/samples/subsys/fs/fs_sample failed because that path did not exist from the clean worktree root; rerun with the absolute cached Zephyr sample path passed.
   Memory: FLASH 214508 B / 16776960 B (1.28%); iram0_0_seg 49388 B / 329 KB (14.66%); dram0_0_seg 62408 B / 313 KB (19.47%); irom0_0_seg 66302 B / 16 MB (0.40%); drom0_0_seg 148972 B / 16 MB (0.89%).

Review outcomes:
- Explorer confirmed existing board model: SPI3 shared by LoRa/display/SD, LoRa CS GPIO9, display CS GPIO12, SD CS GPIO39, SD node disabled by default, SD CS hog present by default, GPIO10 peripheral rail assumption.
- Test-design recommended baseline gateway, gateway+SD, gateway+display+SD, and Zephyr fs_sample builds; assertions covered Kconfig, DTS node state, CS hog handoff, LoRa retention, FAT/no-mkfs policy, and physical follow-up.
- Codereview 1 initially found P2 risk that FAT mount auto-format default could reformat removable media. Fixed by setting CONFIG_FS_FATFS_MOUNT_MKFS=n. Re-review found no P0/P1/P2 issues.
- Codereview 2 initially found P2 risks: no runtime mount/exercise path in the gateway validation image, and inherited unproven 12 MHz SD speed. Fixed by adding shell FS test commands with 4096 heap and capping SD SPI to 4 MHz. Re-review found no P0/P1/P2 issues.

Deferred hardware validation:
- Created child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.18.1 and marked it blocked on physical T-Deck hardware, SD card, USB serial console, and optional logic analyzer/scope. It covers actual mount/read/write/list/unlink, no-card/bad-card behavior, GPIO10 power, SPI CS coexistence, and any frequency sweep beyond the no-hardware 4 MHz bring-up value.
Third independent codereview pass (Zeno the 6th, 2026-07-02) found no P0/P1/P2 issues. It verified auto-format remains disabled, FS shell commands provide the physical smoke path, the overlay targets tdeck_sd/mmc correctly, SD SPI is capped at 4 MHz, SPI3 CS mapping remains LoRa CS0 GPIO9 / display CS1 GPIO12 / SD CS2 GPIO39, Beads evidence is sufficient, and the only residual risk is physical SD electrical behavior/GPIO10/shared-SPI behavior pending project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.18.1.
EC2 cleanup completed after closure: ran sync and sudo umount /mnt/lichen-zephyr on instance i-0a1a09fa54c21be0e; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and verified state=available with no attachments; terminated instance i-0a1a09fa54c21be0e and verified state=terminated; deleted temporary security group sg-0c8e981ae0d436b3e and verified subsequent describe returns InvalidGroup.NotFound.
close_reason: No-hardware SD validation completed: optional SD validation fragments added, EC2 gateway/combined/fs_sample builds passed, generated DTS/Kconfig inspected, three independent codereviews clean after fixes, and physical SD smoke moved to blocked child project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.18.1.
